notes: OpenCode's `opencode run` is single-shot per invocation. This recording's daemon-side view contains only one session_id (ses_…) — no proc-PID pre-session ready transition appears separately. Phases assert: (1) session born in ready with invariant 'no state_transition to waiting' over the session lifetime, (2) process_exited fires on the same ses_… session. Variants 2/3 (SIGKILL) require driver-level sigkill that opencode's interactive driver does not currently expose.

text: Variant 1: ses_… session in ready within 1s; never enters waiting through end of recording
Variant 1: clean exit on the same session_id
